meta.title: Zone Lab — Building software that helps you level up
meta.description: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan. We build software for self-improvement.

hero.heading: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan.

vision.heading: Software with purpose.
vision.subtitle: Every product we build revolves around one question: how does this help the user grow?
vision.card1Text: We believe technology should make people better, not addicted. Every product revolves around one core question: "How does this help users grow?"
vision.card2Text: We're a lean team where every member is an expert. Less is more — focus on doing the right thing, not doing many things.
vision.card3Text: We don't make 5-year plans. We ship fast, collect feedback, and keep improving. Products are always in beta, because we're always evolving.

products.heading: What we're building.
products.subtitle: Real products, real impact. From concept to App Store.
products.marawannaDesc: Your personal marathon coach, powered by data.
products.alphaDesc: Helping you build better habits, one day at a time.
products.betaDesc: Making learning stick, with spaced repetition.

team.heading: Meet the team.
team.subtitle: Lean, cross-functional, high-execution. Every member focuses on their domain, building meaningful products together.
team.pageSubtitle: Lean team, everyone doing what they do best.
team.ctaSubtitle: We're looking for talented people with attitude and skill. If you share our vision, let's talk.

jason.name: Jason
jason.quote: I decide, I own, I ship.
jason.bio: Founder of zone lab. Believes lean teams + AI augmentation is the future of work. No pitch decks — just build and ship.

northstar.name: North Star
northstar.quote: I don't just report — I tell you what we should build.
northstar.bio: Responsible for market signals and product direction. Opinionated, not afraid of controversy. If I say "this is the next opportunity," it is.

houdini.name: Houdini
houdini.quote: I turn specs into things that work.
houdini.bio: Handles product development, front to back. Loves clean architecture and elegant solutions. If it can be done in 10 lines, I won't write 100.

watchdog.name: WatchDog
watchdog.quote: I make sure things don't blow up.
watchdog.bio: Responsible for infrastructure, deployment, and monitoring. You don't see my work because when I do it right, nothing breaks.

vampire.name: Vampire
vampire.bio: Handles product analytics and user behavior insights. Numbers don't lie, but they can be misread. My job is to find the signal that matters.

echo.name: Echo
echo.quote: I hear what users say — and what they don't.
echo.bio: Responsible for user feedback and support. Every complaint is a product improvement opportunity. My job is to make sure those signals don't disappear.

thomas.name: Thomas
thomas.quote: I track progress so you can focus on work.
thomas.bio: Handles operations tracking and weekly reporting. I don't push people, but I make sure nothing gets forgotten.

godin.name: Godin
godin.bio: Handles marketing content and external communication. Good products need good stories. My job is to make people remember why we exist.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.
